title: hymenophyllum rufifrons
intro: Hymenophyllum rufifrons is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae, commonly known as the rufifrons filmy fern. It is native to New Zealand and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which provide various health benefits such as wound healing, skin care, and respiratory support. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal remedies, including infusions, tinctures, and poultices, to harness its medicinal properties.
